text:
Created attachment 223992
git diff net/intel-ix-kmod update to 3.3.24

Update net/intel-ix-kmod to 3.3.24. See URL for details.

Latest version of this software includes functional and security updates.

Builds fine on 12.2-RELEASE-p6 amd64.

Makes open bug #250943 (net/intel-ix-kmod: update to 3.3.18) obsolete.

Best regards,
Newton
